PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SINGBUSH SHARON CARE OF ADRINI COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TISELL  BERIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGBUSH SHARON CARE OF ADRINI COMPANY $705.87 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $713.87, 1.5% INTEREST PER MONTH ON OUTSTANDING BALANCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
